title: South Indian Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: South Indian Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
